scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,core,server,app -c cyan,magenta,blue,green "pnpm --filter @todograph/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @todograph/core dev" "pnpm --filter @todograph/server dev" "pnpm --filter @todograph/app dev"
scripts.predev:electron: pnpm --filter @todograph/shared build && pnpm --filter @todograph/core build && pnpm --filter @todograph/server build && pnpm --filter @todograph/desktop-host build
scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @todograph/shared build && pnpm --filter @todograph/core build && pnpm --filter @todograph/server build
